name: KP Sharma Oli
reason: Investigation into criminal negligence regarding 76 deaths in 2025. Supreme Court refused interim release yesterday.

name: Ramesh Lekhak
reason: Questioning regarding lethal orders during the Sep 2025 Gen Z uprising. SC issued show-cause notice but kept him in custody.

name: Chhabilal (Chhabi) Rijal
reason: Accused of ordering police to open fire on protesters in New Baneshwar (Sep 2025) as recommended by the Karki Commission.

name: Deepak Khadka
reason: Money laundering investigation regarding burnt cash and license irregularities found during the 2025 unrest.

name: Rekha Sharma
reason: Ongoing investigation into child labor exploitation and domestic abuse allegations.
